brief.demand: Seeks to elect three director nominees (Kurt Adams, Ellen Alemany, and Lauren Taylor Wolfe) to the WEX board to address operational underperformance and poor capital allocation.
brief.rationale: WEX has underperformed peer Corpay and the S&P MidCap 400 with sustained underperformance, value-destructive M&A, and poor corporate governance.
brief.watch_for: WEX annual meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026

brief.demand: Seeking to elect three director nominees at WEX's 2026 annual meeting to address underperformance and governance issues
brief.rationale: Argues WEX's share price and operating performance have significantly trailed peers like Corpay and the S&P MidCap 400 with an operating margin gap exceeding 18 points

brief.demand: Elect independent director nominee Rory Held to board to provide Class A shareholder representation and improve transparency and capital allocation.
brief.rationale: Company's dual-class share structure lacks board accountability leading to poor shareholder returns, operational underperformance, and deficient disclosure practices.

brief.demand: Seeking to elect independent director nominee Rory A. Held to the eight-member board for Class A shareholder representation
brief.rationale: Company lacks transparency, has underwhelming growth, stagnant Class A dividends, and poor capital allocation with significant underutilized real estate assets

brief.target_company: BlackRock closed-end funds (multiple funds including ECAT, BIGZ, BCAT, BFZ, etc.)
brief.target_ticker: ECAT, BIGZ, BCAT, BFZ, BMEZ, BSTZ, MHN, MYN, MPA, BNY
brief.stake_size: 23.9% in ECAT (~$353M), significant positions across 10 BlackRock CEFs totaling billions
brief.demand: Replace board members and terminate BlackRock as investment manager to unlock shareholder value by closing discount to NAV
brief.rationale: BlackRock funds trade at persistent discounts to net asset value with poor governance and underperformance destroying billions in shareholder value
brief.watch_for: 2026 annual meeting proxy votes and potential settlement discussions

brief.demand: Seeking to elect board nominees to narrow the fund's discount to NAV and improve shareholder value through better governance
brief.rationale: GDV trades at a persistent discount to net asset value that the activist believes can be narrowed through board changes and corporate actions
brief.watch_for: Annual shareholder meeting on May 11, 2026 for trustee election results

brief.demand: Elect independent director Rory Held to improve governance, capital allocation, transparency and restore quarterly earnings calls
brief.rationale: Company has poor capital allocation having retained 90% of net income ($1.5B) over a decade with flat earnings, dual-class structure limits Class A shareholder voice despite majority economic ownership

brief.demand: Elect three independent director nominees and declassify the board for annual elections
brief.rationale: Company has lost creative leadership and lacks proper board oversight amid stock decline and CEO succession failures
brief.watch_for: 2026 annual meeting shareholder vote on director nominees and declassification proposal

brief.demand: Replace board directors with three independent nominees and declassify the board to restore brand creativity and strategic focus.
brief.rationale: Company has lost brand identity and creative direction under current board leadership, resulting in 65.9% stock decline and $20 billion market cap loss.
brief.watch_for: 2026 annual shareholder meeting proxy vote and definitive proxy statement filing
